title: hyperV machine rm: failure advancing enumeration (2147749924)
body:
[Log](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/6658097823875072/html/machine-hyperv-podman-windows-rootless-host-sqlite.log.html#t--run-basic-podman-commands-Volume-should-be-disabled-by-command-line--1)
```
  C> podman.exe machine rm --force 0bdf83e71d0b
  Error: failure advancing enumeration (2147749924)
```
I don't know how new this flake is. I no longer look at podman-machine flakes; it was just an accident that I saw this one.

comments.body:
It is not new, I have seen for some time.
Error comes from here https://github.com/containers/libhvee/blob/7c033e8b83f778f0361c185af23f4be79b0fe069/pkg/wmiext/enum.go#L89
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.

still seeing this https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/6245385053667328/html/machine-hyperv-podman-windows-rootless-host-sqlite.log.html

I noticed it is always the same number and found this https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/windows/win32/wmisdk/wmi-error-constants

> WBEM_E_PROVIDER_NOT_CAPABLE
>
>    2147749924 (0x80041024)
>
>    Provider cannot perform the requested operation. This can include a query that is too complex, retrieving an instance, creating or updating a class, deleting a class, or enumerating a class.


Noq of course that is totally useless to me since we don't know why it is failing.

so that is still a thing in the new github actions setup
